framework_metadata.name: A-Share Multiple Limit-Up Probability Scoring Framework (MLUP)

scoring_scale.interpretation: Probability-weighted composite score representing relative likelihood of achieving 2+ limit-ups within next week

factor_definitions.weight_rationale: Limit-up stocks often exhibit momentum persistence in A-shares due to retail investor herding behavior and algorithmic trend-following. Historical data suggests 60%+ of multi-limit-up stocks had prior limit-up within 5 days.
Concept-driven investing dominates A-share short-term movements. Policy catalysts and sector rotation create concentrated capital flows. 70%+ of multi-limit-up stocks are current hot theme leaders.

factor_definitions.factor_name: Float and Liquidity (流通性与筹码结构)
factor_definitions.weight_rationale: Smaller float enables easier price manipulation and retail speculation. Turnover rate indicates capital participation intensity. Combined float+turnover predicts sustained limit-up feasibility.
Hard catalysts provide narrative justification and media coverage. Earnings surprises and M&A are strongest catalysts, while contract wins provide medium-term support.
Retail sentiment drives A-share limit-up persistence. Social media heat and margin trading data reflect FOMO (fear of missing out) intensity.

factor_definitions.factor_name: Historical Seasonality (季节性与日历效应)
factor_definitions.weight_rationale: A-shares exhibit calendar effects: pre-holiday speculation, conference seasonality, and end-of-quarter effects. Lower weight due to secondary importance vs momentum.

scoring_logic.calculation_method: Weighted sum of normalized factor scores
scoring_logic.normalization: Each factor's raw score is scaled to its weight allocation, ensuring max achievable = 100

special_adjustments.note: ST stocks have 5% limit, making consecutive limits more achievable

special_adjustments.adjustment: Exclude or apply separate model (different dynamics)
special_adjustments.note: IPO stocks have special trading rules for first 5 days

special_adjustments.adjustment: Apply momentum penalty if prior suspension
special_adjustments.note: Post-resumption behavior differs from continuous trading

scoring_logic.minimum_data_requirement: Stock must have traded for > 60 days with average daily volume > 10 million RMB

high_probability.label: High Probability (高概率)
high_probability.estimated_occurrence_rate: Historical backtest suggests 25-35% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days
high_probability.position_sizing_suggestion: If participating, treat as high-risk speculation; maximum 2-3% portfolio allocation

medium_probability.label: Medium Probability (中等概率)
medium_probability.estimated_occurrence_rate: Historical backtest suggests 8-15% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days
typical_characteristics: Moderate momentum (1 recent limit-up or strong uptrend)
medium_probability.position_sizing_suggestion: Higher uncertainty; maximum 1% portfolio allocation if traded

low_probability.label: Low Probability (低概率)
low_probability.estimated_occurrence_rate: Historical backtest suggests <5% of stocks in this tier achieve 2+ limit-ups within 5 days
low_probability.position_sizing_suggestion: Not recommended for limit-up chasing strategies

model_limitations: Past performance does not guarantee future results
Black swan events (regulatory changes, market crashes) can override all signals
High-frequency traders and algorithms may arbitrage away patterns
Surveillance and trading halts by exchanges can interrupt momentum
execution_risks: Limit-up stocks may open limit-up with no liquidity (一字涨停)
Gap-down risk on following day (open limit-down) is significant
T+1 trading rule prevents same-day exit
regulatory_risks: 交易所重点监控 (exchange surveillance) may trigger trading restrictions
停牌核查 (trading halt for investigation) common after 3 consecutive limit-ups
Window guidance to brokerages may limit buying

backtesting_recommendations: Validate on minimum 2 years of historical A-share data
Control for survivorship bias and look-ahead bias
Verify with out-of-sample data before deployment
monitoring_requirements: Update factor weights quarterly based on market regime changes
Track prediction accuracy by tier (expected vs actual hit rate)
Monitor for factor decay (as more traders discover patterns)

disclaimer: This framework is for educational and research purposes only. Stock trading involves substantial risk. Multiple limit-up chasing is a high-risk speculative strategy not suitable for most investors. This model does not constitute investment advice. Always consult qualified financial advisors and comply with local regulations. 股市有风险，投资需谨慎。
